name: ReThink | Evolved 6
short_description: ReThink | Evolved 6 is a Puzzle Game in a peaceful futuristic setting, that features a variety of Puzzles that utilize Lasers and the behavior of light and it's colors to create challenging problems to solve.
detailed_description:
ReThink | Evolved 6 is a first person puzzle game in a peaceful futuristic setting, that features a variety of Puzzles that utilize Lasers and the behavior of light and it's colors to create challenging problems to solve.

Use newly added and already proven gameplay mechanics to puzzle your way through the game's beautiful world, which is now filled with even more puzzles than in previous games.

ReThink | Evolved 6 features more than 50 Puzzles that make use of newly introduced features and old ones alike, to keep the gears in your head turning.

All puzzles follow the same set of rules, but often come with a twist that will make you think about your solution, and often rethink it.

Improvements over ReThink | Evolved 6:

  • Adjusted and smoothed difficulty progression

  •  New features and puzzle elements

  •  Improved performance

  •  Adjustments/Improvements to existing features

  •  Improved Movement through the game

The game also comes with more adjustments and improvements.
